# Sunware Technologies

> Sunware Technologies is a global technology services company specialising in Artificial Intelligence, Data Engineering, Cloud Solutions, Digital Transformation and Product Engineering. We serve enterprise clients across the USA, UAE, UK and India.

## About

Sunware Technologies was founded in Cupertino, California, USA. The company operates globally with offices in:
- USA: 20065 Stevens Creek Blvd, Suite B-2B, Cupertino, CA 95014
- UAE: Unit No. 144, DMCC Business Centre, Level 5, Jewellery & Gemplex 2, Dubai
- UK: 6th Floor, Forest House, 16-20 Clements Road, Ilford, IG1 1BA
- India (Chennai): 117, KSR Nagar, Ambattur, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600053
- India (Pune): Sky Loft, Creaticity Mall, Off Airport Road, Yerawada, Pune 411006
- India (Bengaluru): 29/A, 27th Main Road, Sector 5, HSR Layout, Bengaluru 560102

Email: connect@sunwaretechnologies.com
Website: https://sunwaretechnologies.com

## What We Do

Sunware Technologies provides end-to-end technology services across three practice areas:

### Solution Engineering & Development
- Data Analytics: Business intelligence, dashboards, advanced analytics
- Data Science & AI: Machine learning models, NLP, predictive analytics, AI strategy
- Data Engineering: Data pipelines, data lakes, data warehouses, ETL/ELT
- Enterprise Application Development: Custom web apps, microservices, API integration
- Cloud Services: AWS, Azure, GCP migration, architecture, managed services
- IoT Solutions: Device connectivity, edge computing, smart operations
- Infrastructure: IT infrastructure design, hybrid cloud, managed services

### Strategy & Transformation
- Technology Consulting: IT roadmap, architecture decisions, digital strategy
- Digital Transformation: Process automation, legacy modernisation, cloud-first strategy
- AI Enablement: AI adoption, implementation, change management
- Data Engineering: Scalable data infrastructure for enterprise decision-making

### Operational Support & Expansion
- Staff Augmentation: Vetted tech talent across AI, cloud, data engineering
- Maintenance & Support: Application maintenance, performance monitoring, 24/7 support
- Microsoft Solutions: Azure, Dynamics 365, Power Platform, Microsoft 365
- Neo4J Graph Technologies: Graph database implementation and consulting
- Salesforce Expertise: CRM implementation, customisation, integration
- Odoo Solutions: ERP implementation and customisation
- Mobile App Development: iOS, Android, cross-platform apps
- Cybersecurity: Threat assessment, security architecture, compliance
- AIoT Integrations: AI-powered IoT for smart operations
- Automation & Efficiency: RPA, workflow automation, intelligent automation

## Products

- **EdgeData360** (edgedata360.com): Real-time edge intelligence platform

## Industries Served

- Healthcare & Life Sciences
- Banking & Financial Services
- Retail & E-Commerce
- Media & Entertainment

## Key Facts

- Headquarters: Cupertino, California, USA
- Offices: USA, UAE, UK, India (Chennai, Pune, Bengaluru)
- Services: AI, Data Engineering, Cloud, Digital Transformation, Product Engineering
- Clients include enterprises in banking, healthcare, pharmaceutical, retail, and media sectors
- Technology partners: Neo4J, Salesforce, Odoo, Microsoft Azure, AWS
